name: devin
title: Devin
description: Browse Devin sessions, inspect recent activity, open sessions in Devin, create new sessions, and send follow-up messages without leaving Raycast.
author: anthony_quach

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Devin API Key
preferences.description: Personal API Key (apk_user_) or Service API Key (apk_) used to access Devin's v1 API.

preferences.name: appBaseUrl
preferences.title: Devin App URL
preferences.description: Base URL used when opening sessions in the Devin web app.

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: Devin API URL
preferences.description: Base URL for the Devin API. Leave the default unless you're using a custom deployment.

preferences.name: currentUserEmail
preferences.title: My Devin Email
preferences.description: Used to separate your sessions from everyone else's in the main list.

commands.name: sessions
commands.title: Devin
commands.subtitle: Devin
commands.description: Browse Devin sessions, inspect recent activity, and manage active work from Raycast.

commands.name: create-session
commands.title: Create Session
commands.subtitle: Devin
commands.description: Create a new Devin session from Raycast.
